create.title: Create New Memory
create.description: Organize your documents by creating focused memory zones for different areas of knowledge.
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what you want to achieve with this memory. What specific knowledge or skills are you building? This helps organize relevant information effectively.
create.example: Example: "Learn modern React patterns and best practices for building scalable web applications"

edit.title: Edit Memory
edit.description: Update the name and description of this memory.
edit.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what you want to achieve with this memory...

manage.title: Manage Memory
manage.description: View, edit, and organize all your memories in one place.
manage.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
manage.deleteWarning: This will remove the memory from all associated files. This action cannot be undone.

selector.title: Manage Memory
selector.goalPlaceholder: Describe what you want to achieve with this memory. What specific knowledge or skills are you building?
selector.example: Example: "Learn modern React patterns and best practices for building scalable web applications"
